patterns.message: Import design-system components from the public surface ('design-system' / index.js), not component internals.

no-restricted-syntax.message: Raw hex color — use a FuzeFront color token via var() (e.g. var(--accent-color), var(--bg-tertiary)). The only allowed literal is #fff for text on an accent/gradient fill.
Raw rgba()/rgb() — use a color token via var(). For a soft tint, prefer var(--accent-soft) or color-mix(in srgb, var(--token) 14%, transparent).
Font not provided by the design system. Use a font token: --font-display (Space Grotesk), --font-sans (Inter), --font-mono (JetBrains Mono).
